texto: The promoters of emancipation were not bent on promoting a revolution so much as they were intent on snuffing one out – a backward-looking, aristocratic revolution – in order to put the South back on the track it should have been on from the beginning of the republic.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Allen C. Guelzo sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “The promoters of emancipation were not bent on promoting a revolution so much as they were intent…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, civil-war, education, útil em momentos de education e progress.
